title: centaurea neiceffii
intro: Centaurea neiceffii, a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, is native to the high-altitude meadows of the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea neiceffii are attributed to its antioxidant, antitumor, and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues, including inflammation and infections. Herbal preparations of Centaurea neiceffii can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
